topic.title: How to Download CapCut and Start a New Project
topic.shortdesc: Get started by downloading CapCut and creating your first project.

section.title: Download CapCut
section.p: 1. Open the App Store (iPhone) or Google Play Store (Android).
3. Tap "Get" or "Install" and wait for the download to complete.
4. Open the app once installation is finished.

section.title: Create a New Project
section.p: 1. Tap "Create a new project" or the "+" icon.
2. Select your first video clip or photo from your device.
